title: Add main item title to Inbox Notifications subject
excerpt: Right now, the inbox notifications show a breadcrumb title of “Board>Subitem” for sub item updates, however, I’d like to see it be titled “Board>Main Item>Subitem”, as the main item tells me the what and the subitem is t…

posts.author: lehmkuja (Jennifer Lehmkuhl)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now, the inbox notifications show a breadcrumb title of “Board>Subitem” for sub item updates, however, I’d like to see it be titled “Board>Main Item>Subitem”, as the main item tells me the what and the subitem is the detail.
